name: Public Policy Holding Company, Inc.
summary: Public Policy Holding Company, Inc. (PPHC) is a global strategic communications holding company operating 12 member firms providing government relations consulting (lobbying), corporate communications and public affairs consulting, and compliance and insights services. Founded in 2014 and headquartered in Washington, D.C., PPHC serves over 1,400 clients including nearly half of the Fortune 100, operating across the US, UK, and offices in Shanghai, Abu Dhabi, and Dubai.

products.name: Government Relations Consulting
products.description: Advocacy, strategic guidance, political intelligence, and issue monitoring at US federal, state levels, and in the UK.

products.name: Corporate Communications & Public Affairs Consulting
products.description: Crisis communications, financial communications, investor relations, litigation support, branding, social/digital media, and public opinion research.

products.name: Compliance and Insights Services
products.description: Lobbying compliance services and legislative tracking solutions for clients.
